name: Justice P.S. Narasimha
bio: Justice Pamidighantam Sri Narasimha is a judge of the Supreme Court of India who was directly elevated from the Bar — a relatively rare occurrence. He served as Additional Solicitor General of India and Senior Advocate before his appointment. He is known for his expertise in constitutional law, arbitration, and commercial law. Justice Narasimha has been part of important Constitution Bench hearings on electoral bonds, same-sex marriage, and citizenship.
